history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade changed ResponseEntity.getStatusCode() return type from HttpStatus to HttpStatusCode, causing type mismatch compilation errors.
history.qwen_rationale: Adding UpgradeSpringFramework_6_1 explicitly ensures the HttpStatusCode migration recipes run to fix remaining HttpStatus assignments that UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 missed.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed after Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade due to incompatible types: HttpStatusCode cannot be converted to HttpStatus in UCSBCurriculumService.java.
history.qwen_rationale: The previous attempt included UpgradeSpringFramework_6_1 alongside UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3, which may have caused recipe conflicts or redundant transformations. Removing the explicit framework upgrade and relying solely on the transitive UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe should allow its internal Spring 6.1 migration recipes to correctly handle the HttpStatusCode/HttpStatus type changes. The chain then proceeds with standard JDK 21 plugin and build upgrades.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation fails after Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade due to Spring Framework 6 API change where ResponseEntity.getStatusCode() returns HttpStatusCode instead of HttpStatus, and the migration recipe did not refactor the assignment.
history.qwen_rationale: Switching to UpgradeSpringBoot_3_2 (minimum for JDK 21) combined with explicit UpgradeSpringFramework_6_1 and SpringBoot3BestPractices ensures all Spring 6 migration recipes are triggered to handle the HttpStatusCode/HttpStatus type mismatch, while adhering to the compatibility matrix for JDK 21.

history.qwen_rationale: Removing the non-existent best practices recipe and relying solely on the transitive UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe resolves the validation error. This step will handle the javax-to-jakarta migration and Spring 6 code changes, after which the standard Java 21 plugin and build upgrades can proceed.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation fails after Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade due to Spring Framework 6 API change: HttpStatusCode cannot be converted to HttpStatus in UCSBCurriculumService.java.
history.qwen_rationale: The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe upgrades dependencies to Spring 6 but may miss specific HttpStatusCode type changes in source code. Explicitly including UpgradeSpringFramework_6_1 alongside the Boot upgrade ensures the framework-specific source migration recipes run to fix the type mismatch before compilation.
